description: Sign in with your France Travail account to access secure video conferences powered by the OxyLayer Growth Mesh.
meeting_instructions: Enter a meeting ID to join a video conference
session_expired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
invalid_meeting_id: Please enter a valid meeting ID
invalid_user_id: Please enter a valid user ID
invalid_meeting_id_strict: Meeting IDs must be at least 3 characters and use letters, numbers, or hyphens.
invalid_user_id_strict: User IDs must be at least 2 characters and use letters, numbers, or hyphens.
meeting_id_rules: Use 3-50 characters: letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
user_id_rules: Use 2-50 characters: letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
powered_by: Powered by OxyLayer and France Travail
connection_mode_fallback_hint: Runs entirely in the browser with the OxyLayer oxygen-layer toolkit.
fallback_not_available: Client fallback is unavailable because the credentials are missing.
fallback_auto_enabled: API session creation failed. We automatically switched to the OxyLayer Growth Mesh.
fallback_active_banner: OxyLayer Growth Mesh active — audio, video, chat, and layout controls are handled locally.
fallback_missing_sdk: Unable to load the OxyLayer toolkit. Please refresh or check your network connection.
restored_preferences: We restored your previous meeting details to help you rejoin faster.
join_requirements_unmet: Add a valid meeting ID and user ID to continue.
readiness_title: UX polish, web pentest, and commercialization
readiness_ux_description: Shorten the path to a great first call
readiness_fast_join: Instant rejoin from saved meeting details
readiness_valid_inputs: Inputs validated in real time for fewer errors
readiness_accessibility: Accessible controls with clear helper text
readiness_security_description: Lock down the surface before the audit
readiness_surface_locked: Core routes protected and rate limited
readiness_commercial_description: Package the product for a clean handoff
landing_title: Private consultations for your family network
landing_subtitle: Launch bilingual consultations with secure access, curated profiles, and a friendly onboarding flow for every new member.
landing_highlight_secure_desc: Passwords are hashed and sessions stay protected with strict validation.
landing_highlight_bilingual_desc: A single toggle keeps French and English users aligned.
landing_highlight_family_desc: Registrations are required so every attendee is verified.
landing_step_one: Register with your email to join the family circle.
landing_step_two: Choose a consultation and receive your private meeting ID.
landing_step_three: Join the call with secure access and guided controls.
index_subtitle: Browse live and upcoming support sessions, curated for your family members.
index_card_career_desc: Guided sessions to map job goals and training paths.
index_card_support_desc: Private rooms for social workers and trusted advisors.
index_card_family_desc: Secure video rooms for the whole family circle.
index_checklist_schedule: Pick a consultation slot with your advisor.
index_checklist_join: Join the room with your secure meeting ID.
feed_subtitle: Share updates, engage with creators, and track daily momentum.
feed_streak_helper: Post once per day to keep your streak alive.
feed_sidebar_subtitle: Schedule posts, review analytics, and keep the feed fresh.
feed_compose_subtitle: Keep it real and keep it safe.

feed_post_failed: We could not publish that post. Please try again.
feed_action_failed: We could not save that action. Please retry.

feed_edit_failed: We could not update that post.

feed_trends_empty: No trends yet. Start the conversation.
feed_ad_body: Run a promoted drop with creator bundles and audience targeting.
family_invite_body: Create your secure account to join consultations and keep access private.
